old_value: {"id":"neighbourhoodwatch-npv","title":"Email verification flow and protected route middleware","description":"Handle Supabase email confirmation callback. Add Next.js middleware that redirects unauthenticated users away from protected routes (/dashboard, /report, /profile) to /auth/login.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"bmason@equalexperts.com","created_at":"2026-03-01T16:44:49Z","created_by":"Brian Mason","updated_at":"2026-03-01T16:44:49Z"}

new_value: Middleware updated: protects /dashboard, /report, /profile with redirect to /auth/login?next=<path>. Authenticated users redirected away from /auth/*. Login respects ?next= param.
